skill.name: code-evolution
skill.author: hanialshater
skill.description: Autonomous multi-agent code evolution system for optimization problems. Use when solving complex optimization problems (packing, geometry, scheduling, search) through evolutionary approaches with multiple independent AI agents. Multi-start hybrid heuristic+SLSQP methods significantly outperform single approaches. Triggers include genetic algorithms, evolutionary optimization, multi-agent problem solving, parameter tuning at scale, AlphaEvolve-style research, or evolving code solutions across generations.
